descriptionShort: Jason Phillips scores three goals as Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-2 to win the Centennial Cup championship.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes won the Centennial Cup junior-A hockey championship on May 11, 1987, defeating the Humboldt Broncos 5-2 in the final game in Humboldt, Saskatchewan. Jason Phillips led the Sockeyes with three goals, while Frank Romeo made 46 saves in goal and earned tournament and game MVP honors. Paul Rutherford and Dave Tomlinson also scored for the British Columbia champions.
